ns0:entry.ns0:title: Genesis-Embodied-AI/genesis-world
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Genesis-Embodied-AI/genesis-world
Language: python
Simulation platform for general-purpose robotics & embodied AI learning.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenBMB/VoxCPM
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenBMB/VoxCPM
Language: python
VoxCPM2: Tokenizer-Free TTS for Multilingual Speech Generation, Creative Voice Design, and True-to-Life Cloning

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenMOSS/MOSS-TTS
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenMOSS/MOSS-TTS
Language: python
MOSS‑TTS Family is an open‑source speech and sound generation model family from MOSI.AI and the OpenMOSS team. It is designed for high‑fidelity, high‑expressiveness, and complex real‑world scenarios, covering stable long‑form speech, multi‑speaker dialogue, voice/character design, environmental sound effects, and real‑time streaming TTS.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: agentscope-ai/agentscope
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/agentscope-ai/agentscope
Language: python
Build and run agents you can see, understand and trust.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anthropics/claude-code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code
Language: python
Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anthropics/knowledge-work-plugins
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anthropics/knowledge-work-plugins
Language: python
Open source repository of plugins primarily intended for knowledge workers to use in Claude Cowork

ns0:entry.ns0:title: anthropics/skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/anthropics/skills
Language: python
Public repository for Agent Skills

ns0:entry.ns0:title: chopratejas/headroom
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/chopratejas/headroom
Language: python
Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dograh-hq/dograh
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dograh-hq/dograh
Language: python
Open source voice AI platform. Self-hosted alternative to Vapi and Retell. On Prem, BYOK across Speech to Speech or LLM/STT/TTS, with a visual workflow builder, MCP native and telephony support.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: harry0703/MoneyPrinterTurbo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/harry0703/MoneyPrinterTurbo
Language: python
利用AI大模型，一键生成高清短视频 Generate short videos with one click using AI LLM.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/agent-governance-toolkit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/agent-governance-toolkit
Language: python
AI Agent Governance Toolkit — Policy enforcement, zero-trust identity, execution sandboxing, and reliability engineering for autonomous AI agents. Covers 10/10 OWASP Agentic Top 10.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/markitdown
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/markitdown
Language: python
Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: modelscope/FunASR
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/modelscope/FunASR
Language: python
Industrial-grade speech recognition toolkit: 170x realtime, 50+ languages, speaker diarization, emotion detection, streaming, and OpenAI-compatible API.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mukul975/Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills
Language: python
754 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 5 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND & NIST AI RMF · agentskills.io standard · Works with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI & 20+ platforms · 26 security domains · Apache 2.0

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openai/skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openai/skills
Language: python
Skills Catalog for Codex

ns0:entry.ns0:title: p-e-w/heretic
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/p-e-w/heretic
Language: python

ns0:entry.ns0:title: st-tech/ppf-contact-solver
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
